title: イカすライブのために

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to leave the studio after finishing my
task at hand when I notice Yukino Bijin practicing
her dancing.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeppers! I wanna have a spiffy dance to show off
at the winn'n concerts too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
choice_data_list: You looked so cute dancing your heart out.
You looked so cute dancing your heart out.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But, uh... won't I look kinda plain? 'Specially next
to all the others...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... D-do you know how I can add some razzle
dazzle t'my concerts?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
That's a swell idea! You're so right! What's lack'n
from my danc'n is some oomph!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
choice_data_list: I think you need more practice.
I think you need more practice.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Being flashy sure is hard...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Acrobatics... Y'mean like backflips?! That sounds
pretty tough...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No! I gotta do at least that much if I wanna be a
real city girl!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I can't b'lieve how embarrass'n that was!
I'm such a dund'rheeead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Half her words are lost in her wail and the other
half in her heavy accent, but it's pretty clear that
she's completely mortified.
